full_llm_interaction_log.purpose: Failure mode analysis: poor init of h and trivial zero solution
full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: What failure mode does the paper describe in Section 5.3? Why does poor initialization of h lead to trivial zero vector? What is the one-sentence fix?
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Structured failure explanation and link to Section 5.3 and warm start fix.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: Verified against Section 5.3 (init and weighted average classification).

top_5_prompts.prompt: What failure mode does the paper describe in Section 5.3 (poor initialization of h)?
Why does randomly picking k relevant documents as initial h lead to the 'trivial zero vector as solution'?
How do I demonstrate a failure scenario and link it to an assumption?
top_5_prompts.why_important: Rubric: demonstrate failure and link to assumption.

top_5_prompts.prompt: What is the one-sentence fix recommended in the paper (weighted average classification warm start)?
How do I identify queries where Latent SVM underperforms the baseline?

student_declaration.statement: I declare that this JSON file contains a complete and honest record of my LLM usage for Part B.
